OpenGL

mortennobel/SimpleRenderEngine: Small C++14 render engine
JulianThijssen/Flux: A real-time physically based rendering engine written in C++ and OpenGL
yushroom/FishEngine: Simple, Unity-like Game Engine.
JoshuaSenouf/GLEngine: Rendering Engine using C++ and OpenGL
ddiakopoulos/sandbox: sandbox of experimental & reusable code in C++11 & modern openGL
debug-draw/samples at master · glampert/debug-draw
ddiakopoulos/tinygizmo: An immediate mode 3D gimzo (translation, rotation, scale for scene editing) in ~1200 LoC
DiligentGraphics/DiligentEngine: Master repository for Diligent Engine project
JoeyDeVries/Cell: OpenGL C++ Graphics Engine
Nadrin/PBR: An implementation of physically based shading model & image based lighting in various graphics APIs.
LukasBanana/LLGL: Low Level Graphics Library (LLGL) is a thin abstraction layer for the modern graphics APIs OpenGL, Direct3D, Vulkan, and Metal
mosra/magnum-examples: Examples for the Magnum C++11/C++14 graphics engine
mosra/magnum: Lightweight and modular C++11/C++14 graphics middleware for games and data visualization
hugoam/kiui: Auto-layout Ui library, lightweight, skinnable and system agnostic, with an OpenGL backend
1kingja/graphics: Code for my OpenGL graphics on YouTube
RippeR37/GLUL: OpenGL Utility Library.
DanWatkins/Terrain3D: Interactive 3D terrain simulation using OpenGL 4 and Qt 5.
iondune/ionEngine: 3D graphics engine designed for rapid prototyping and extensibility
cmaughan/zep: Zep - An embeddable editor, with optional support for using vim keystrokes.
hmazhar/moderngl_camera: A quaternion based camera for modern OpenGL
subokita/Arcball: Sample simple arcball trackball for OpenGL 4 in C++
64/vin: Cross platform OpenGL-based text editor written in C++

Graphics Tool libs

DirectX 11

GitHub - microsoft/DirectXTK: The DirectX Tool Kit (aka DirectXTK) is a collection of helper classes for writing DirectX 11.x code in C++
GitHub - matt77hias/RasterTek: DirectX 11 Tutorials
GitHub - jjuiddong/Introduction-to-3D-Game-Programming-With-DirectX11: Book Example Code in [Introduction to 3D Game Programming With DirectX11 by Frank Luna ]
GitHub - kevinmoran/BeginnerDirect3D11: Starter code samples for Direct3D11
GitHub - rayXgl/directx11-tutorials: Updated http://braynzarsoft.net/index.php?p=DX11Lessons DirectX11 Tutorial sources
GitHub - DDreher/DX11Sandbox: Small rendering sandbox for DirectX 11
GitHub - matt77hias/D3D11-Projects: 🔬 Projects to start learning Direct3D11 (D3D11)
